title: G-5 Protects the Children
description: On pages 7–9, this part follows Caesar Clown, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Punk Hazard Guards, Unknown person #5. The central beat is g-5 protects the children.
scene: The scene focuses on g-5 protects the children, with Caesar Clown, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Punk Hazard Guards, Unknown person #5 shaping the Punk Hazard conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Why aren't we seeing their solidified forms!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Remember to be a good one.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The fact that we can't see G-S...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: How'd they get out of that cage!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Thank goodness, it seems like everyone's safe...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: But where should I go now!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So they're hoping to escape, huh ...!?

summary: G-5 Protects the Children. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
